response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems, with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and exposure to high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging systems, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or A/B testing — the core focus of this Principal/IC6 role. There's also limited evidence of Principal-level scope (multi-team, multi-product platform ownership) or the data/statistical aptitude required. Worth a screening call to probe pricing-team experimentation work at Optilyz and platform-building scope, but likely under-leveled for IC6.
strengths: Strong engineering fundamentals with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development practices
High-throughput distributed systems experience (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Sociomantic)
Polyglot full-stack background with AI-agent infrastructure exposure at re:cinq
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or A/B testing systems
Lacks evidence of Principal/IC6-level scope — no multi-team platform ownership or cross-org initiative leadership
Limited signals on data aptitude, statistical analysis, or metrics/telemetry infrastructure work

key_factors.factor: Strong distributed systems and engineering craftsmanship background
